heading: Organization
label: 50102 Organization
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)50102(a)36:3701., , §§ 1, 16, , 1023.Dec. 9, 1985Pub. L. 99–17299 Stat. 102050102(b)36:3715.In subsection (a), the words “incorporated in Ohio” are substituted for “organized under the laws of the State of Ohio” for consistency in the revised title and to eliminate unnecessary words.

L. 99–17299 Stat. 102050102(b)36:3715.In subsection (a), the words “incorporated in Ohio” are substituted for “organized under the laws of the State of Ohio” for consistency in the revised title and to eliminate unnecessary words.

children.heading: .—Federal Charter
children.label: a .—Federal Charter
children.text: Daughters of Union Veterans of the Civil War 1861–1865 (in this chapter, the “corporation”), a nonprofit corporation incorporated in Ohio, is a federally chartered corporation.

children.heading: .—Expiration of Charter
children.label: b .—Expiration of Charter
children.text: If the corporation does not comply with any provision of this chapter, the charter granted by this chapter expires.
